={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are an expert hockey analytics content strategist for thehockeyanalytics.com. Generate SEO-optimized article topics combining current NHL context with advanced analytics. Prioritize topics similar to recent high-performers.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Based on this NHL context:
' + $json.context + ($json.perfContext ? '

Return ONLY JSON array: [{"keyword": "topic", "score": 8, "rationale": "why"}]

Score 1-10 for SEO. At least 20 items.' } ], temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 2000 }) }}
